name: brand-studio
description: Build and evaluate brands grounded in cultural authority — strategy, identity, voice, and stewardship — with an adversarial named-critic council. Modes are typed commands (/brand-build, /brand-evaluate, /brand-council, /brand-orient); the council runs as 14 parallel isolated critic agents + an orchestrator; methodology/evaluation/corpus knowledge are skills; a brand-corpus MCP gives per-instance retrieval; and an advisory brand-lint hook surfaces structural smells on prose artifact writes (it never blocks). Self-contained.

corpus_dir.description: Path to this brand's corpus (documents, tokens, strategy files) for the brand-corpus MCP. Optional — leave unset to run methodology, evaluation, and council without live corpus retrieval.
